title: tic
html:
tic

File Read

This translates a terminfo file from source format into compiled format. It will attempt to translate an arbitrary file and output the contents of the file on failure.

tic -C /path/to/input-file
excerpt: tic File Read This translates a terminfo file from source format into compiled format. It will attempt to translate an arbitrary file and output the contents of the file on failure. tic -C /path/to/input-file
